input.title: Learn Resolution
input.errMultipleEntailment: Only one entailment symbol (|=, ⊢) is allowed per formula.
input.errInvalidEquals: The '=' character can only be used as part of an entailment operator (|=).
input.errNotFormula: Input must be a formula in CNF.
input.errNeedTwoClauses: Please enter at least two clauses to perform resolution.
input.errMaxClauses: Formula is too large. Maximum {{max}} clauses allowed (You have {{current}}).
input.errMaxVariables: Formula is too complex. Maximum {{max}} unique variables allowed (You have {{current}}).
input.errMultipleConclusions: Only one clause is allowed after the entailment symbol.
input.errMissingConclusion: You must provide a conclusion after the entailment symbol.
input.errMultiChar: Variables must be a single letter. Found: "{{literal}}"
input.errMissingOperator: Variables must be separated by an operator ('v' or ',' or '&').

results.msgContradictionEntailment: An empty clause was derived. This proves that the negated conclusion contradicts the premises. Therefore, the original entailment holds true!
results.msgContradictionSatisfiable: An empty clause was derived. This means the set of clauses is unsatisfiable.
results.msgEmptySetEntailment: All clauses were reduced and the set is empty, but no contradiction was found. Therefore, the entailment does NOT hold.
results.msgEmptySetSatisfiable: All clauses were reduced and the set is empty. This means the original set of clauses is satisfiable (consistent).

engine.negateConclusion: Negated the conclusion and added it to the set.

sandbox.removedPureLiteral: Clause removed because "{{literal}}" is a pure literal.
sandbox.errInvalidRemoval: This clause is not a tautology, is not subsumed, and has no pure literals.
sandbox.errSystemMemory: System Error: Clause not found in memory. Please click reset app.
sandbox.errDuplicate: You have already resolved this exact pair.
sandbox.errInvalidMatch: Invalid move! These clauses do not resolve on "{{literal}}".
sandbox.errMustRemoveTarget: You must remove clauses containing the selected literal.
sandbox.resolutionDoneSweep: All resolutions for "{{literal}}" are done. Now you must manually remove all clauses containing "{{literal}}".
sandbox.phaseSweep: All pairs for "{{literal}}" resolved. Now remove clauses containing it.
sandbox.phaseReductionAfter: All done resolving on "{{literal}}". Now perform reduction.
sandbox.phaseSelectLiteral: Select a literal to resolve on.
sandbox.entailmentPrefix: The conclusion was negated and added to set of premises.

tutorial.timelineFrame1: 1. The engine starts with your initial clauses.
tutorial.timelineFrame2: 2. It finds complementary literals (P and ~P) and resolves them.
tutorial.sandboxStep1: Step 1: Click the red 'X' button on the tautology (A v ~A) to remove it.
tutorial.sandboxStep2: Step 2: Now click the first clause (A v B) to select it.
tutorial.sandboxStep3: Step 3: Click the second clause (~A v C) to resolve them.
tutorial.sandboxStep4: Great job! You created a new resolvent.
